long_description:
[NETWORK]-Genctl-Network-Pod-CrashLoopBackOff [DAL] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/troubleshooting_pods_crash_loopback.html
TIP Situation: Observed kube-error-pod crashloopbackoff issue in genctl-network-prod
TIP Short Description: Pods in crashloopbackoff
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-network-genctl:::mzone717-zonelet02:microservice:net-control-cleanup-bdb9dbdc5-z2l6m
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
